title: WATER-READING-CYCLE
scope: USER-DIRECTED water domain, phase 3 of 12 (the operational cadence). Automate read -> review -> bill: caretaker reading reminder on a configured read-date, a landlord review window with reminders, and — CRITICALLY — auto-approve at window close so water billing is never silently halted. Scout facts: cron via routes/console.php Schedule::command()->dailyAt()->timezone('Africa/Nairobi')->onOneServer()->name('phaseNN-...'); reminder pattern = iterate rows + Cache::add idempotency key per item+period + NotificationService::send(recipientId,type,subject,message,data?,landlordId?). Notification type = 3 layers (Notification.php const + TYPE_URGENCY_MAP [IMPORTANT = whatsapp+email+in_app, email DELIVERS]; notification_preferences.{type}_enabled column default true; notifications.type ENUM extension). Building->caretaker_id->caretaker(); landlord via building->landlord_id. Invoices: invoices:automate daily 06:00 (buildings.auto_generate_invoices + invoice_generation_day == today) -> InvoiceService::generateInvoiceForLease; water is part of the monthly invoice (water_due); calculateWaterCharges bills ONLY status=approved+is_invoiced=false readings -> a reading left PENDING is silently unbilled forever (THE BUG). No review-window/deadline exists today. TenantActivity::create uses 'type' (not 'action'); set landlord_id explicitly + performed_by null for system actions. Money decimal:2. Review window is RECORDED-relative (reviewDays from reading.created_at) for robustness; read-date reminder is calendar (day-of-month).

findings.title: Reading-cycle config columns + auto_approved flag
findings.evidence: No read-date, review-window, or auto-approval concept exists on the water config or readings.
findings.remediation: Migration adds water_reading_day (unsignedTinyInteger nullable, day-of-month) + water_review_days (unsignedTinyInteger nullable) to payment_configurations + buildings (building null=inherit), and water_readings.auto_approved (bool default false). Models: fillable + casts. Phase88 test: columns exist + cast.

findings.title: Water settings editor exposes read-date + review-window
findings.evidence: The shared editor has no reading-cycle fields.
findings.remediation: WaterSettingsData returns reading_day + review_days; WaterSettingsForm.vue adds inputs (global + per-building inherit-aware, shown when charging); UpdateWaterSettingsRequest rules (water_reading_day 1-28 nullable, water_review_days 0-31 nullable; per-building too); controller persists (inherit=>null). i18n en/sw/ar. Phase88 test: landlord persists reading_day + review_days; caretaker 403.

findings.title: NET-NEW water_reading_due notification type
findings.evidence: No notification type tells the caretaker to take readings.
findings.remediation: 3 layers: Notification::TYPE_WATER_READING_DUE const + TYPE_URGENCY_MAP=IMPORTANT; notification_preferences.water_reading_due_enabled (default true); notifications.type ENUM extension. Phase88 test: type in map.

findings.title: water:reading-reminders daily command
findings.evidence: Caretakers get no prompt to read on the cycle date.
findings.remediation: Command iterates water-enabled buildings whose effective water_reading_day == today.day with an assigned caretaker; NotificationService::send(caretaker, water_reading_due, ...). Idempotent Cache key per building+year-month. Scheduled dailyAt Africa/Nairobi onOneServer named phase88-water-reading-reminders. Phase88 test: a building due today notifies its caretaker; not-due does not; idempotent.

findings.title: NET-NEW water_review_due notification type
findings.evidence: No notification tells the landlord to review before the window closes / that readings auto-approved.
findings.remediation: 3 layers: Notification::TYPE_WATER_REVIEW_DUE const + TYPE_URGENCY_MAP=IMPORTANT; notification_preferences.water_review_due_enabled default true; notifications.type ENUM extension. Used for both the review reminder and the auto-approval escalation. Phase88 test: type in map.

findings.title: water:review-window: remind landlord + AUTO-APPROVE at window close (the safety)
findings.evidence: THE BUG: a pending reading is silently excluded from invoicing and never bills. A review gate that never closes silently halts water revenue.
findings.remediation: Daily command: (a) for water-enabled buildings with pending readings recorded >= (reviewDays-1) days ago, NotificationService::send(landlord, water_review_due, 'review before close'), idempotent per reading; (b) AUTO-APPROVE pending readings whose created_at <= now-reviewDays (effective per building): WaterReading::autoApprove() (status=approved, auto_approved=true, reviewed_by=null, note), TenantActivity::create type=water_reading_auto_approved landlord_id+performed_by=null, then ONE escalation NotificationService::send(landlord, water_review_due, 'N readings auto-approved') per landlord+run. Scheduled dailyAt onOneServer named phase88-water-review-window. Phase88 test: a pending reading past the window is auto-approved (so it bills) + landlord notified; a fresh pending reading is left alone.

findings.title: Landlord can request a re-read (dispute) on a non-invoiced reading
findings.evidence: If a reading looks wrong the landlord can only reject it; there is no reopen-for-re-read that re-prompts the caretaker.
findings.remediation: WaterReadingController::requestReread (landlord-only, non-invoiced) resets the reading to pending, clears review fields, records a note, and notifies the caretaker (water_reading_due 're-read requested'). Route readings.request-reread + WaterReadingPolicy gate + a button on the review surface. Phase88 test: landlord reopens a reading -> pending + caretaker notified; cannot reopen an invoiced reading.

findings.title: Phase 88 behavioral + surface tests
findings.evidence: Cron cadence + the auto-approve safety + config need regression guards.
findings.remediation: Phase88WaterReadingCycleTest (config persist, reading reminder dispatched/idempotent, review reminder, AUTO-APPROVE bills + escalates, re-read reopens) + Phase88WaterReadingCycleSurfaceTest (schema, both notification types mapped, commands exit 0, routes, lang parity). Existing water + invoice suites stay green.

findings.title: Runbook + closeout + memory + multi-reviewer pass
findings.evidence: Operational cadence needs operator docs; review discipline per phase.
findings.remediation: docs/runbooks/water.md reading-cycle section (read-date reminder, review window, auto-approve safety, re-read). nav-audit clean. Multi-reviewer read-only pass (CodeRabbit + independent + silent-failure). Memory: phase88 plan + forward-path + pending-path. Name next = Phase 89 [WATER-HISTORICAL-IMPORT].

closeout.summary: The water read -> review -> bill cadence + the safety that water revenue is never silently dropped. CYCLE-CONFIG: water_reading_day + water_review_days on payment_configurations + buildings + water_readings.auto_approved; shared settings editor extended. READING-REMINDER: NET-NEW water_reading_due type (3 layers) + water:reading-reminders daily (caretaker reminded on the building reading day, idempotent per building+month). REVIEW-AUTOAPPROVE: NET-NEW water_review_due type + water:review-window daily — nudges the landlord AND auto-approves any reading left pending past the review window (WaterReading::autoApprove + TenantActivity audit + per-landlord escalation) so a pending reading bills instead of hanging forever. RE-READ: WaterReadingController::requestReread reopens a non-invoiced reading + re-prompts the caretaker. CI: behavioral + surface tests + runbook.
closeout.tests: Phase-88 tests: WaterReadingCycle 8 + Surface 5. Full water suite + WaterReadingController 96 regression green. Pint/build/eslint/nav-audit clean.
closeout.review: Multi-reviewer read-only pass (CodeRabbit + pr-review-toolkit code-reviewer + silent-failure-hunter) caught + fixed: CRITICAL cron loops aborting the whole portfolio on one poison row (now per-building try/catch+Log+continue); HIGH review_days=0 same-day auto-approve over-bill (now min:1); MEDIUM withoutOverlapping on both crons, approve() clears stale auto_approved, requestReread warns when no caretaker; N+1 config memoized. Accepted-as-correct: created_at-vs-reading_date (bills in its own period), soft-deleted units (no bill), plan-gate on cron (don't-lose-revenue).
closeout.constraints_preserved: THE SAFETY: a reading left pending past the window auto-approves so it always bills (the bug = pending readings silently excluded from invoicing + hanging forever). Crons run scope-free (withoutGlobalScope landlord) + explicit landlord_id. Notification types IMPORTANT (email+in-app default-on). water Settings landlord-only (Phase 86). Money decimal:2. Review window measured from reading.created_at (robust to late reads).
